sigWerErrors.reason: Omitting 'không' (no/not) reverses the meaning of the sentence, making it the opposite of the intended statement.
'trường' (school or a name) and 'truyền' (to transmit) are completely different words, changing the meaning and making the sentence incoherent.
'trần' (a name) and 'chọn' (to choose) are unrelated, which changes the subject and meaning of the sentence.
